commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e91599b0cc698c2fe2c57f7ddf5288e3e86369d1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces the fresh-install `openclaw/multipass` seed with `openclaw/crabline` and adds a D1 migration that creates a crabline row from multipass before disabling multipass.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: an existing card whose repo remains `openclaw/multipass` after the migration will call `claimRunning`, hit `requireRepo`, and fail because the migration disables the multipass row.
commands.review_followup: - A human maintainer should decide the repo-cutover upgrade behavior; automation should not choose whether to migrate old cards or preserve a drain period.

target.title: chore: migrate multipass repo seed to crabline
target.body:
## Summary
- update the fresh-install repo seed from openclaw/multipass to openclaw/crabline
- add a tiny D1 migration for existing deployments that enables openclaw/crabline when openclaw/multipass exists
- disable the stale openclaw/multipass allowlist row without rewriting cards or workflow cache rows

## Verification
- sqlite3 :memory: '.read migrations/0001_initial.sql' '.read migrations/0005_openclaw_repos.sql' "select repo, enabled from repos where repo in ('openclaw/multipass','openclaw/crabline') order by repo;"
- sqlite3 :memory: '.read migrations/0001_initial.sql' "insert into repos (repo, enabled, created_at, updated_at) values ('openclaw/multipass', 1, 1, 1);" '.read migrations/0019_crabline_repo_cutover.sql' "select repo, enabled from repos where repo in ('openclaw/multipass','openclaw/crabline') order by repo;"
- pnpm check *(fails on existing lint debt unrelated to this SQL-only change: curly/no-array-sort/etc. in existing source files)*
target.author: romneyda

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
